sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58670" key="koloiw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολοιώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n58670.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">daw-like</tr_>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flocking together</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.93e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
